## Meeting Purpose

  - [Both are interested in event collaborations, with Marcel seeking Gianna's expertise for upcoming events](https://fathom.video/share/V5F2Fe6u4Zc-6Y96p5QPyyaTyT-J1spt?tab=summary&timestamp=1449.0)
